'''Tree fishers''' were carnivorous plants from the jungle world of [[Port Haven/Legends|Port Haven]]. It consisted of a large body with a collection of vines. The small vines were used to attach to trees while the larger ones were used to entrap prey from the forest floor.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-02-XX -->''[[Platt's Starport Guide]]''
